name: Hot Chocolate for Adults Only
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup almond or hazelnut flavored liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips over simmering water, stirring until smooth.
2. Combine the milk, half and half, and sugar in a saucepan. Heat gently until small bubbles form around the edge of the pan.
3. Slowly add about 1 cup of the milk mixture to the melted chocolate, stirring constantly.
4. Return the chocolate mixture to the remaining milk mixture.
5. Stir in the rum and liqueur.
6. Pour into mugs and top with a dollop of whipped cream and a cinnamon stick.
7. Serve immediately.
